from fastapi import FastAPI
import httpx
import time

app = FastAPI()


@app.get("/users/{user_id}")
def get_user(user_id: int):
    response = httpx.get(f"https://api.example.com/users/{user_id}")
    return response.json()


@app.post("/process")
def process_data(data: dict):
    result = httpx.post("https://processor.example.com/run", json=data)
    time.sleep(0.1)
    return result.json()


@app.get("/report")
def generate_report():
    db_data = fetch_from_database()
    pdf = render_pdf(db_data)
    storage.upload("report.pdf", pdf)
    return {"status": "generated"}


@app.post("/webhook")
def handle_webhook(payload: dict):
    response = httpx.post("https://external.service/hook", json=payload)
    save_to_db(response.json())
    return {"ok": True}
